headline: Baltimore’s Legacy Landscape Team — Design, Build & Care Without the Chaos
subheadline: Your current site proves your craftsmanship, but this concept makes it easier for homeowners to understand your services fast and contact you immediately — with a cleaner modern experience built for today’s clients.
service_descriptions: We translate your goals into a complete outdoor plan that balances aesthetics, function, and long-term plant health.
From grading and planting to full outdoor transformations, our crews execute your project with clean timelines and precise workmanship.
Patios, walkways, and gathering spaces are crafted to feel cohesive with your home while standing up to Maryland weather.
Year-round maintenance keeps your property polished, healthy, and guest-ready without you managing multiple vendors.

reviews.text: From concept sketches to the final planting day, every detail was handled professionally. The front and backyard now feel like an intentional extension of our home.
We hired Maxalea for a full patio and planting refresh, and the communication alone set them apart. The team showed up on time, kept the site clean, and delivered exactly what they promised.
Four seasons later, everything still looks incredible. Their design decisions were practical, beautiful, and clearly built to last.

issues_addressed: CTA flow can be more direct for conversion
